methods.method_name: Demographic History Analysis using Tajima's D and Fu's Fs
methods.description: This method involves tracing population growth using Tajima's D statistics and Fu's Fs test to examine demographic history.

steps.description: Trace population growth using Tajima's D statistics and Fu's Fs test.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Tajima's D and Fu's Fs statistics for population growth analysis

methods.description: This method tests evidence for population expansion by examining pairwise mismatch distributions using Arlequin software.

steps.description: Examine pairwise mismatch distributions in Arlequin.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze mismatch distributions using Arlequin software

steps.description: Compute the raggedness index and the sum of squared deviations (SSD) between observed and expected mismatch distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate raggedness index and SSD for mismatch distribution

steps.description: Test statistical significance of raggedness index and SSD using a bootstrap approach with 1000 replicates.
steps.searchable_summary: perform bootstrap test for statistical significance of raggedness index and SSD

steps.description: Estimate the time at which the population expansion began using the relationship t = 2ut.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate population expansion time using mismatch distribution mode and mutation rate

methods.description: This method examines past population dynamics using Bayesian skyline plots, a model-free coalescent-based method implemented in BEAST.

steps.description: Run Bayesian skyline plot analysis in BEAST with fixed mutation rate and HKY+I+G model.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Bayesian skyline plot analysis using BEAST with specified model and mutation rate

steps.description: Run 10^7 iterations of the MCMC chains, sampling every 1000 iterations and discarding the first 10% as burn-in.
steps.searchable_summary: execute MCMC chain iterations with specified sampling and burn-in settings

steps.description: Generate Bayesian skyline plots with Tracer 1.4.
steps.searchable_summary: create Bayesian skyline plots using Tracer software
